title: Projects
headerTitle: Shipped apps across Native Android and Flutter ecosystems.
headerDesc: Filter by platform to see how the architecture and tech stack adapt to deliver optimal performance, security, and real-time connectivity.
noProjectsFound: No projects found for this category.

spectra-care.title: Spectra Care: Telehealth & Hardware Platform
spectra-care.summary: Enterprise telehealth platform with Jetpack Compose, Agora video calling, and 6-in-1 medical monitor integration.
spectra-care.description: Production Android telehealth app built with Jetpack Compose and MVI architecture. Features low-latency Agora video consultations, reactive device drivers for Spectra Care 6-in-1 health monitors, and secure SOAP EHR data synchronization.
spectra-care.altText: Spectra Care — Android Native telehealth app with Agora video calling and Spectra IoT health monitor integration built by Muhammad Awais[cite: 1]
highlights: Spectra Care 6-in-1 IoT health monitor sync[cite: 1]

zouris.title: Zouris: Holistic Wellness Platform
zouris.summary: Cross-platform wellness app delivering guided sessions, audio streams, and affirmations.
zouris.description: Zouris is a holistic wellness platform engineered using Flutter where certified coaches and practitioners share guided sessions, meditations, and real-time audio streams with native UX performance across Android and iOS.
zouris.altText: Zouris wellness coaching app — cross-platform meditation and audio streaming platform built by Muhammad Awais

egora-b2b.title: Egora B2B: Restaurant Partner Platform
egora-b2b.summary: White-labeled partner dashboard for restaurant owners to manage orders, pick-ups, and live reservations[cite: 1].
egora-b2b.description: White-labeled partner platform engineered using Flutter, Dio, and GetIt[cite: 1]. Empowers restaurant owners to independently manage dine-in, pickup, QR code ordering, and thermal receipt printing with reliable payment integrations[cite: 1].
egora-b2b.altText: Egora B2B restaurant partner dashboard — order, reservation, and QR management built by Muhammad Awais[cite: 1]
highlights: Real-time order sync and notification engine[cite: 1]

egora.title: Egora: Smart Restaurant Ecosystem
egora.summary: High-scale restaurant ecosystem with QR ordering, reservation management, and Bluetooth hardware integrations[cite: 1].
egora.description: Scalable reservation and dining system built using Flutter and Jetpack Compose[cite: 1]. Features QR code ordering, integrated XStax payment processing (10k+ monthly transactions), and custom Bluetooth thermal printer hardware drivers achieving 100% reliability[cite: 1].
egora.altText: Egora restaurant app — QR ordering, reservation system, and Bluetooth thermal printer integration built by Muhammad Awais[cite: 1]
highlights: Bluetooth thermal printer integration with 50% reduced latency[cite: 1]
XStax payment gateway processing 10k+ monthly transactions[cite: 1]

makernote.title: Makernote: Interactive EdTech
makernote.summary: Educational platform with real-time collaboration and offline synchronization.
makernote.description: High-performance educational platform for teachers and students — engineered with Clean Architecture for real-time collaboration, instant note synchronization, and seamless offline data persistence.
makernote.altText: Makernote EdTech app — real-time collaboration and offline synchronization built by Muhammad Awais

eco-grocery.title: Eco Grocery: Smart Inventory Tracker
eco-grocery.summary: Smart grocery tracking app with barcode scanning, recipe recommendations, and expiry alerts.
eco-grocery.description: Intelligent Android utility app featuring a dynamic grocery list linked to a recipe recommendation engine, paired with built-in camera barcode scanning for instant item cataloging and expiry management.
eco-grocery.altText: Eco Grocery Android app — barcode scanning grocery tracker built by Muhammad Awais

hcloud.title: HCloud: Clinic Management Suite
hcloud.summary: Enterprise operations portal for healthcare providers with appointment and prescription sync[cite: 1].
hcloud.description: Enterprise-grade clinic management application engineered for doctors[cite: 1]. Built with MVVM, Hilt, and Room DB to enable real-time prescription creation, patient records management, and offline-first appointment scheduling[cite: 1].
hcloud.altText: HCloud clinic management suite — real-time prescription sync and appointment scheduling built by Muhammad Awais[cite: 1]
highlights: Offline-first sync queue using Room DB[cite: 1]

healthwire.title: Healthwire: HealthTech Ecosystem
healthwire.summary: Leading healthcare application with 2M+ downloads, telemedicine, lab bookings, and secure payment integrations[cite: 1].
healthwire.description: Architected one of Pakistan's top healthcare platforms — powering pharmacy logistics, lab-test bookings, Twilio video consultations, and local payment gateways (Meezan, JazzCash, Foree) with a 99%+ crash-free session rate[cite: 1].
healthwire.altText: Healthwire healthcare app — pharmacy logistics, lab booking, and Twilio telemedicine built by Muhammad Awais[cite: 1]

dongamers.title: DonGamers: E-Sports Platform
dongamers.summary: Global gaming platform featuring real-time Pusher chat, tournament brackets, and optimized monetization[cite: 1].
dongamers.description: Engineered an international e-sports platform on Native Android[cite: 1]. Migrated codebase from Java to Kotlin, architected scalable real-time chat using Pusher (+15% engagement), and optimized In-App Purchases and Google AdMob[cite: 1].
dongamers.altText: DonGamers e-sports platform — real-time chat and tournament tracking built by Muhammad Awais[cite: 1]
